data.title: SEALSQ partners with Quantix Edge Security for Spain's first Post-Quantum Semiconductor Personalization Center, expects $25M revenue. Spanish Govt invests €19.6M, aims for €793M economic impact in Murcia by 2030.
data.description: In Geneva, Switzerland, news has emerged that the Spanish Government has disclosed a substantial public investment of €19.6 million in Quantix. This investment is expected to have a significant economic influence in the Region of Murcia, totaling an impressive €793 million over the upcoming five years. This injection of funds into Quantix is anticipated to catalyze growth and development in the region, signaling positive advancements in the economic landscape.

data.title: Cre8 Enterprise Limited partakes in Zijin Gold Int'l IPO in Hong Kong as sole printing service provider, handling documentation management for the second largest IPO in the world this year.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Cre8 Enterprise Limited (Nasdaq: CRE), a financial printing service provider based in Hong Kong, revealed that it is the exclusive service provider for Zijin Gold International Company Limited (Stock code: 2259.HK) for their share listing on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange through an IPO. Cre8 is offering comprehensive documentation services including typesetting, translation, graphic design, printing, and distribution for the prospectus and associated documents. The company is also aiding in the submission process to the China Securities Regulatory Commission.

data.title: New Messaging SDK by Sui Stack in alpha phase enhances Web3 communication, providing secure tools for developers. Integrates with Sui's blockchain and decentralized storage solutions. Explore further.
data.description: An alpha version of the Sui Stack Messaging SDK has been launched, providing developers with essential tools for secure and customizable communication within Web3 applications. This SDK seamlessly integrates with Sui's blockchain and decentralized storage solutions, offering a comprehensive solution for developers.

data.title: Fairfax India to commence normal course issuer bid to repurchase up to X million shares.
data.description: According to recent reports, the number of COVID-19 cases in the country has reached a total of 150,000, with 10,000 new cases being reported in the past 24 hours. The death toll has risen to 5,000, with 500 new deaths recorded in the same time period. Health officials are urging the public to continue practicing social distancing and following safety guidelines to curb the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to control the situation. Additionally, 50,000 patients have recovered from the virus after receiving medical treatment. The healthcare system is facing challenges due to the increasing number of cases, prompting authorities to ask for support from the international community.

data.title: Fairfax Financial will conduct a Normal Course Issuer Bid for Subordinate and Preferred Shares on TSX.
data.description: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited has announced its intention to begin a Normal Course Issuer Bid (NCIB) through the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) for its Subordinate Voting Shares and several series of Preferred Shares. These include Cumulative 5-Year Rate Reset Preferred Shares (Series I - TSX: FFH.PR.I), Cumulative Floating Rate Preferred Shares (Series J - TSX: FFH.PR.J), and Cumulative 5-Year Rate Reset Preferred Shares (Series K - TSX: FFH.PR.K). The TSX has accepted Fairfax's notice for the bid, which will involve purchases made in accordance with TSX rules and policies. The company plans to either cancel or reserve Subordinate Voting Shares bought for share-based payment awards, while Preferred Shares bought will be cancelled.

data.title: Qvantel and Optiva merge to enhance AI-driven BSS solutions for CSPs on a global scale.#TechNews
data.description: Two seasoned players in the global business support system (BSS) industry have come together, creating a top-tier global team that provides scalable full-stack solutions to drive growth and innovation for CSPs (Communication Service Providers). This collaboration brings a wealth of experience and expertise to the table, promising enhanced opportunities for CSPs looking to expand their capabilities and offerings.

data.title: China's XCMG Machinery secures record-breaking export order for green mining equipment with Fortescue, largest iron ore producer.
data.description: XCMG Machinery (SHE:000425), a top construction equipment manufacturer, has signed a significant agreement with Fortescue, a major iron ore producer, in a move towards green mining equipment solutions. The agreement, signed in Beijing on September 26, 2025, aims to enhance sustainability in mining operations. XCMG is a globally renowned company, while Fortescue stands as one of the leading iron ore producers globally. This strategic partnership signifies a significant step towards environmentally friendly practices in the mining industry.

data.title: Chile's construction industry is forecasted to grow by 2.5% in 2025 due to investments in transport and mining.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the Chile Construction Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report analyzes market trends and forecasts by sector, including Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential sectors up to 2029. The Chilean construction industry is projected to see a 2.5% growth in real terms in 2025. This growth is attributed to investments in transport infrastructure and the mining sector. The Banco Central de Chile has reported this positive outlook in the Monthly Economic Activity.

data.title: Bitcoin drops below $109K, Ethereum at $3,880.82, XRP at $2.70, Dogecoin at $0.2223. 226,572 traders liquidated for $970.63M in 24hrs.
data.description: On Friday morning, the crypto market experienced a decline, notably with Bitcoin plummeting below $109,000 for the first time since September. The current prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $108,864.88, Ethereum at $3,880.82, Solana at $191.33, XRP at $2.70, Dogecoin at $0.2223, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001155. Recent data reveals that 226,572 traders faced liquidation in the past day, totaling $970.63 million in losses. Additionally, there were net outflows of $258.5 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs and $251.2 million from spot Ethereum ETFs on Wednesday. As observed by crypto trader Jelle, Bitcoin is approaching its 200-day moving average cluster, a critical area in recent trading patterns. For more information, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Disasters strike unexpectedly, preparation is key. Empower people with tools for resilience. #DisasterPreparedness.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in New York, it was reported that unforeseen calamities such as hurricanes, wildfires, floods, and earthquakes can occur suddenly, emphasizing the importance of being prepared. Providing individuals and communities with resources for resilience is crucial.
